description: Retrieve user-defined firewall policy ordering for a specific source/destination zone pair.

local.python:
import http.client


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("192.168.0.1")
payload = ''
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>'
}
conn.request("GET", "/proxy/network/integration/v1/sites/{siteId}/firewall/policies/ordering?sourceFirewallZoneId=%7BsourceFirewallZoneId%7D&destinationFirewallZoneId=%7BdestinationFirewallZoneId%7D", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
local.ansible:
- name: Get User-Defined Firewall Policy Ordering
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.network:
    path: "/v1/sites/{siteId}/firewall/policies/ordering"
    method: GET
    query:
      sourceFirewallZoneId: "{sourceFirewallZoneId}"
      destinationFirewallZoneId: "{destinationFirewallZoneId}"
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data

remote.python:
import http.client


conn = http.client.HTTPSConnection("api.ui.com")
payload = ''
headers = {
  'Accept': 'application/json',
  'X-API-Key': '<X-API-Key>'
}
conn.request("GET", "/v1/connector/consoles/{consoleId}/proxy/network/integration/v1/sites/{siteId}/firewall/policies/ordering?sourceFirewallZoneId=%7BsourceFirewallZoneId%7D&destinationFirewallZoneId=%7BdestinationFirewallZoneId%7D", payload, headers)
res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()
print(data.decode("utf-8"))
remote.ansible:
- name: Get User-Defined Firewall Policy Ordering
  ubiquiti.unifi_api.network:
    path: "/v1/sites/{siteId}/firewall/policies/ordering"
    method: GET
    query:
      sourceFirewallZoneId: "{sourceFirewallZoneId}"
      destinationFirewallZoneId: "{destinationFirewallZoneId}"
  register: result


- debug:
    var: result.data
